name: kaspa-raffle-static-v0
description: Static, testnet-first raffle dApp for Kaspa Toccata.

scripts.verify: npm run build && node scripts/verify-dev-loop.mjs && node scripts/verify-covenant-artifact.mjs
scripts.verify:covenant: npm run build && node scripts/verify-dev-loop.mjs --require-covenant && node scripts/verify-covenant-artifact.mjs
